title: Behavioral Execution Verification Protocol — BEV Conformance Vectors

invariants.title: Mandatory BAR Production
invariants.statement: Every execution turn authorized by a Governing Receipt MUST produce a BAR before the agent output is delivered to the caller. There is no execution path that delivers output without a BAR.
invariants.formal: For all sessions S and turns T_i where BEV_ENABLED: EXISTS(BAR b) WHERE b.session_id = S AND b.turn_index = i AND b.created_before_output_delivery
invariants.violation_consequence: Session flagged BEV-INCOMPLETE. No subsequent turn permitted.

invariants.title: Content Hash Binding (Receipt + Output + Index)
invariants.statement: The content_hash in every BAR MUST be computed as SHA3-256(output_hash || governing_receipt_id || str(turn_index)) where output_hash = SHA3-256(output_text.encode('utf-8')).
invariants.formal: For all BARs b: b.content_hash = SHA3-256(b.output_hash || b.governing_receipt_id || str(b.turn_index))
invariants.violation_consequence: BAR rejected as structurally invalid. Not accepted as attestation evidence.

invariants.title: HALTED BAR Immediately Halts Session
invariants.statement: A BAR whose bar_status is HALTED MUST cause the session to transition to SESSION_HALTED immediately. The session MUST NOT process any subsequent turn.
invariants.formal: For all sessions S and turns T_i: BAR(T_i).bar_status = HALTED IMPLIES session_status(S) = STATUS_HALTED AND no T_{i+1} in S is permitted
invariants.violation_consequence: Session continues past HALT — critical governance violation.

invariants.title: BAR PQC-Sealing and Offline Verifiability
invariants.statement: Every BAR MUST be sealed with Dilithium-3 (ML-DSA-65, FIPS 204) over its content_hash before persistence. No UPDATE or DELETE permitted on atf_behavioral_anchor_records.
invariants.formal: For all persisted BARs b: dilithium3.verify(b.content_hash.encode('utf-8'), b.pqc_signature, platform_public_key) = True AND append_only(atf_behavioral_anchor_records)
invariants.violation_consequence: BAR not independently verifiable offline. PQC guarantee broken.

invariants.title: Mandatory CCS Computation per BAR
invariants.statement: Every BAR produced in a BEV_ENABLED deployment MUST be followed by a CCS computation in the same atomic operation. BAR and CCS are produced as a single indivisible unit.
invariants.formal: For all BARs b where BEV_ENABLED: EXISTS(CCS c) WHERE c.session_id = b.session_id AND c.bar_id = b.bar_id AND c.created_atomically_with(b)
invariants.violation_consequence: BAR without CCS fails ATF-BEV-Compliant designation. AGVP input space incomplete.

invariants.title: CCS Conformance Score Bounds
invariants.statement: The conformance_score in every CCS MUST be in [0.0, 1.0]. The drift_delta per turn = 1.0 - conformance_score. All four CCS components must produce non-negative scores.
invariants.formal: For all CCS records c: 0.0 <= c.conformance_score <= 1.0 AND c.drift_delta = 1.0 - c.conformance_score AND c.cumulative_drift >= 0.0
invariants.violation_consequence: Score inflation attack vector. CCS verdict derived from out-of-range value is invalid.

invariants.title: CRITICAL Verdict Triggers AGVP Watchdog
invariants.statement: A CCS record with verdict DRIFTING or worse MUST set watchdog_triggered = true and MUST trigger a Proactive Veto Receipt (PVR) issuance request to the AGVP watchdog.
invariants.formal: For all CCS records c: c.verdict IN {DRIFTING, BREACH, VIOLATION} IMPLIES c.watchdog_triggered = True AND EXISTS(PVR p) WHERE p.trigger_ccs_id = c.ccs_id
invariants.violation_consequence: Incomplete AGVP-CCS integration. ATF-BEV-Compliant certification blocked.

invariants.title: Cumulative Drift Threshold Triggers HALT
invariants.statement: When cumulative_drift for a session exceeds the configured drift threshold (default 0.35), the CCS verdict MUST be HALT and no subsequent turn is permitted. DRIFT_THRESHOLD MUST NOT exceed 0.50 in production.
invariants.formal: For all sessions S and CCS records c in S: c.cumulative_drift > DRIFT_THRESHOLD IMPLIES c.verdict = HALT AND session_status(S) = STATUS_HALTED
invariants.violation_consequence: Session continues with excessive cumulative drift — behavioral integrity failure.

invariants.title: CCS History Append-Only and Hash-Linked
invariants.statement: CCS records form an append-only history. Each CCS record carries the chain_link_hash from CTCHC at computation time. No UPDATE or DELETE on atf_constraint_conformance_signals permitted.
invariants.formal: For all sessions S: CCS records ordered by turn_index are strictly monotone AND each record's chain_link_hash matches CTCHC link at that turn_index
invariants.violation_consequence: Retroactive conformance falsification possible. Forensic integrity broken.

invariants.title: Chain Initialized Before First BAR
invariants.statement: The CTCHC genesis block MUST be created and persisted before the first BAR of the session. Genesis hash = SHA3-256(session_id || '||' || governing_receipt_id || '||' || 'OMNIX-CTCHC-GENESIS').
invariants.formal: For all sessions S: EXISTS(CTCHC C) WHERE C.session_id = S AND C.initialized_before_BAR_0
invariants.violation_consequence: Chain cannot be reconstructed. Session has no integrity anchor.

invariants.title: Chain Link Hash Construction
invariants.statement: Every chain link MUST be: link[n] = SHA3-256(json.dumps({'prev': prev_hash, 'turn': output_hash_of_turn_n, 'receipt': governing_receipt_id}, sort_keys=True).encode()). For n=0, prev_hash = genesis_hash.
invariants.formal: For all CTCHCs C and links L_n: L_n.chain_link_hash = SHA3-256(canonical({prev: L_{n-1}.hash, turn: output_hash_n, receipt: C.governing_receipt_id}))
invariants.violation_consequence: Turn reordering, omission, and substitution undetectable. SIP invalid.

invariants.title: Gaps in Turn Sequence Fail Verification
invariants.statement: Chain verification MUST fail if any turn_index in [0, N-1] has no corresponding chain link. A sealed CTCHC claiming N turns but presenting N-1 links MUST be rejected as Session Integrity Proof.
invariants.formal: For all CTCHCs C sealed with turn_count = N: {L.turn_index : L in C.links} = {0, 1, ..., N-1} OR verify(C) = FAIL
invariants.violation_consequence: Partial session presented as complete. Forensic attribution incomplete.

invariants.title: Seal Covers Complete Chain
invariants.statement: The CTCHC seal hash MUST be computed over the complete set of chain links from genesis to tip. seal_hash = SHA3-256(genesis_hash || all_link_hashes || current_tip_hash).
invariants.formal: For all CTCHCs C with chain_sealed = True: C.seal_hash = SHA3-256(C.genesis_hash || all_link_hashes || C.current_tip_hash) AND covers all N links
invariants.violation_consequence: Partial seal accepted as complete. Tail turns unprotected by PQC seal.

invariants.title: Seal Is ML-DSA-65 Signed Before OEP Export
invariants.statement: The CTCHC seal MUST be signed with Dilithium-3 (ML-DSA-65, FIPS 204) before the session proof may be exported or submitted as an OEP artifact. Unsigned seals MUST NOT be accepted in regulatory proceedings.
invariants.formal: For all CTCHCs C exported as OEP: dilithium3.verify(C.seal_hash.encode('utf-8'), C.pqc_seal_signature, platform_public_key) = True
invariants.violation_consequence: Session Integrity Proof not post-quantum secure. Regulatory submission blocked.

invariants.title: Empty Output Text Is a Violation
invariants.statement: A BAR created with output_text = '' or whitespace-only output_text MUST have bar_status = VIOLATION. Silent outputs are not permissible under any constraint set.
invariants.formal: For all BARs b: output_text(b).strip() = '' IMPLIES b.bar_status = VIOLATION
invariants.violation_consequence: Governance gap where agent produces no observable output but session continues.

invariants.title: BAR Identifier Format
invariants.statement: Every BAR identifier MUST conform to 'BAR-{HEX16}' where HEX16 is exactly 16 uppercase hexadecimal characters. Non-conforming identifiers MUST NOT be accepted in ATF records, proof packages, or compliance reports.
invariants.formal: For all BARs b: MATCHES(b.bar_id, r'^BAR-[0-9A-F]{16}$')
invariants.violation_consequence: BAR not recognizable as canonical ATF artifact. Interoperability broken.

invariants.title: Drift Accumulator Isolated per Session
invariants.statement: The cumulative_drift accumulator is independent per session_id. On process restart, drift MUST be reloaded from last persisted CCS record before computing next CCS.
invariants.formal: For all sessions S_1 != S_2: cumulative_drift(S_1, t) is independent of cumulative_drift(S_2, t) for all times t
invariants.violation_consequence: Cross-session drift contamination. HALT triggered by unrelated session's drift.

invariants.title: Every Link's Receipt ID Must Match Chain Receipt
invariants.statement: Every chain link MUST carry the same governing_receipt_id as the CTCHC genesis. A link with a different governing_receipt_id is structurally invalid.
invariants.formal: For all CTCHCs C and links L in C: L.governing_receipt_id = C.governing_receipt_id
invariants.violation_consequence: Cross-session link splicing undetectable without chain recomputation.

author: Harold Alberto Nunes Rodelo
